ignores.$comment: False positive: config file paths set at startup from validated env vars/CLI flags. TODO: narrow to specific ruleIds once Oneleet SARIF rule identifier for file-inclusion findings is available.
ignores.reason: False positive. os.Open/os.ReadFile reads config files whose paths are set at startup from validated env vars or CLI flags. No user-supplied input reaches these call sites.

ignores.$comment: False positive: outbound API calls to Signal endpoints from application config. TODO: narrow to specific ruleIds once Oneleet SARIF rule identifier for HTTP variable URL findings is available.
ignores.reason: False positive. Outbound API client calls to Signal service endpoints configured via application config. URLs are not derived from incoming requests or any user input.

ignores.$comment: False positive: 0600 is correct permission for sensitive config files. TODO: narrow to specific ruleIds once Oneleet SARIF rule identifier for WriteFile permission findings is available.
ignores.reason: False positive. WriteFile uses mode 0600, the correct restrictive permission for config files containing sensitive values. Scanner miscategorisation.
